title: Modern Mushroom Blocks
description: Backports the modern mushroom block behaviour. Now, mushroom blocks broken with silk touch give the six sided mushroom blocks (red, brown and stem)
body: This mod backports the modern mushroom blocks. Now, the three six sided mushroom block variants are obtainable in survival, using a silk touch tool. First time loading a world there will be a warning that blocks with IDs 99 and 100 are **mismatched**, but I can confirm, that removing the mod doesn't delete any of the mushroom blocks placed, so it's vanilla compatible.
